children.text: Except as provided in sections 620d(d)(5), 1543(g)(2), and 1595(b) of this title, with respect to the Colorado River Basin Project Act [

), the Upper Colorado River Basin Compact (

et seq.], section 15 of the Colorado River Storage Project Act (
